name: Web Layout
description: A thin protocol-host standard (no impl, no orchestration) whose sole charter is to own the dockable layout-tree interchange Protocol — the portable serialized partition tree that dockview / FlexLayout / golden-layout all converge on. Minted by #1486; the owning-project question was ratified in #1653 (a) — a new thin weblayout host rather than attaching the Protocol to the project-less dockable intent + realizing block (which stay project-less per #1437 Fork 1). The schema is the only lock; the dock manager + popout impl are Frontier UI (#1511–#1514).
summary: Owns the portable, dockable layout-tree interchange protocol.
tierEvidence: Frontier UI ships the dock manager / app-shell that consumes the dockable layout-tree Protocol (blocks/app-shell/AppShell.ts, blocks/dockable/) — a shipped constellation consumer.
